_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning about how the nature of work is changing in Australia and what predictions experts make about the future of work.

_source.w: We are learning about how the nature of work is changing in Australia and what predictions experts make about the future of work.
y: Understanding how work is changing helps us prepare for careers that may not even exist yet.
Predictions about the future of work highlight the skills — like adaptability and digital literacy — that will be most valuable.
This knowledge empowers us to make informed choices about our education and career pathways.
eg: Investigating how technology, automation, and artificial intelligence are changing jobs in Australia.
Exploring which industries are growing and which are declining, and what that means for future workers.
Discussing the rise of the gig economy and flexible work arrangements.
Analysing predictions about which skills will be most in demand in the future.
Examining how remote work has changed the way Australians work since the pandemic.
Debating whether automation will create more jobs than it eliminates.
